body.notes: ResourceMonitorSource currently fires binary alarms (threshold crossed → TWM push). Missing: chronic gradient contribution to milieu from resource posture. CPU 40% → small positive valence. CPU 80% sustained → arousal builds. DB+Ollama on same box → friction in dominance channel. Inference latency high → arousal spike. This is Igors interoception — his body. Closes the physical grounding gap Igor himself identified (ESCAPE HYPOTHESIS memory a82b4dcc, 2026-02-26). Connects to T-inference-colocation-signal. Design note from Akien: inside/outside signals are on the same map — resource state should be first-class milieu input, not a separate alarm pathway.
body.title: Interoception: continuous resource state as milieu signal (not threshold alarms)
body.result: InteroceptionSource added to push_sources.py — continuous 30s VAD gradient from cpu/mem/disk. Maps resource stress to milieu nudge + TWM entry. Registered in run_background_sources().
